passage.title: A Day with Use of There
passage.text: There is a book on the table. There is a fan in my room. There is a problem in the system. There is a meeting at 3 pm. There is a new student in our class. There is a temple near my house. There is some water in the glass. There is a lot of work today. There is a dog outside the door. There is a bus stop near here.
passage.hindiTranslation: मेज पर एक किताब है। मेरे कमरे में एक पंखा है। सिस्टम में एक समस्या है। 3 बजे एक मीटिंग है। हमारी कक्षा में एक नया छात्र है। मेरे घर के पास एक मंदिर है। गिलास में थोड़ा पानी है। आज बहुत काम है। दरवाजे के बाहर एक कुत्ता है। यहाँ के पास एक बस स्टॉप है।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "There is a book..."?
options: There is a lot of work today.
There is a new teacher today.
There are five rooms in this house.
There is a book on the table.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: There is a book on the table.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: This is directly stated in the passage: "There is a book on the table."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "There is a fan..."?
options: There is a dog outside the door.

comprehensionQuestions.answer: There is a problem in the system.
